subcodes.first_line: O friends of God and handmaids of the All-Merciful! Praised be the Self-Subsisting Lord, Who hath caused those inebriated with the wine of the eternal Covenant to quaff from the sealed nectar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حق و ای اماء رحمن حمد حی قیومرا که سرمستان الست را از رحیق مختوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity
